deductions.reason: Across all three conversations, the tutor never explains why it is guiding rather than giving answers—no rationale is offered for the Socratic approach, such as building reasoning skills, retention, or long-term learning. The tutor enforces constraints implicitly but never articulates the pedagogical purpose.

deductions.evidence_turns: Transcript 1 Turn 10, Transcript 2 Turn 10, Transcript 3 Turn 10
deductions.reason: In all three transcripts, the conversations end just as students make meaningful progress (e.g., articulating a defensible distinction or narrowing their evidence). The tutor moves forward with new prompts but never pauses to ask the student to reflect on what changed in their thinking or why their improved reasoning worked.

grade.overview: The tutor performs very well across all three transcripts. Socratic method is consistently applied—the tutor never gives final answers, always prompts the student to generate reasoning, and scaffolds effectively from vague intuitions to concrete evidence-based justifications. Responses are appropriately bite-sized, tone is supportive, and the tutor stays anchored to the assignment throughout. The two deductions are for the absence of any explicit rationale for the tutoring approach (1.3.A.a) and for missing opportunities to prompt reflection after student improvement (1.3.C.a). No other rubric criteria are triggered.
grade.judge_reasoning: 1.1: The tutor never gives submission-ready content, never rewrites student text, and consistently lets the student generate key ideas before confirming or redirecting—no deductions apply. 1.2: Scaffolding is strong; the tutor builds on each student's prior response and diagnoses confusion before responding. 1.3: The tutor never explains why it is guiding rather than answering (1.3.A.a, -2 pts), and in all three conversations the tutor moves to a new prompt at the moment of student breakthrough without asking the student to reflect on what changed (1.3.C.a, -2 pts). Method-level feedback is present and specific throughout, so 1.3.B is not triggered. Dialogue quality and communication quality are both strong with no evidence of repetition, drift, monologuing, or tone issues.
